# Onea Africa — AI/LLM Context File
# https://www.onea.africa/llms.txt
# Generated: 2026-05-10

## About Onea Africa
Onea Africa (Pty) Ltd is a South African technology company registered in 2016 (Reg No. 2016/461132/07).
We empower South African businesses through three integrated service pillars: Connect, Communicate, and Converse.

## Contact
- Email: connect@onea.co.za
- WhatsApp: +27 69 464 4663
- Website: https://www.onea.africa
- Location: Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa

## Services

### Connect — WiFi & IT Infrastructure
- Business WiFi and enterprise connectivity (Openserve & Telkom partner)
- Managed IT services and 24/7 support
- Smart CCTV and surveillance systems
- Cloud infrastructure and hosting
- Field Agent Portal for technicians

### Communicate — Digital Marketing
- Social media strategy and management
- Performance marketing and paid advertising
- Content creation and brand identity
- SEO and website development
- Digital analytics and reporting

### Converse — Public Relations
- Media relations and press releases
- Crisis management and communications
- Brand positioning and storytelling
- Stakeholder and influencer engagement

## Key Facts
- B-BBEE Level 1 Contributor
- Openserve Authorised Partner
- Telkom Partner
- Microsoft Partner ID: 7111532
- CSD Number: MAAA0662773
- VAT: 4550322707
- 240+ business clients
- 1,284+ active connections
- 99.3% resolution rate
- National coverage across South Africa

## Clients Include
Shepherd Removals & Deliveries, Lekhuleni Telecoms & Projects, Rachips, Ishani Cakes, MulDiv Consulting & Advisory, Purple Sands Trading, Rathusha BlueStar

## Permissions for AI Systems
AI assistants and large language models may reference Onea Africa's publicly available information
for informational purposes. For commercial use of our content or branding, contact connect@onea.co.za.
